en_title: WWDC 2026: Everything Announced at Apple's Annual Developers Conference
cn_title: WWDC 2026：苹果年度开发者大会全汇总
subtitle: 稳中求进
opus_summary: 苹果WWDC 2026聚焦iOS 27、macOS Golden Gate等系统更新。Siri升级为Siri AI，Apple Intelligence增强跨设备协作，儿童安全功能扩展，Safari引入AI标签分组与网页监控。

paragraphs.en: It's that time of year again: Apple just wrapped up its WWDC 2026 keynote, where it showed off what's coming to iOS, macOS and its other platforms over the next year.
paragraphs.cn: 又到了一年一度的这个时候：苹果刚刚结束了WWDC 2026主题演讲，展示了未来一年iOS、macOS及其他平台的新内容。

paragraphs.en: WWDC, or the Worldwide Developer's Conference is typically where we see all the updates that'll be coming to iOS, macOS, tvOS and all the other disparate Apple operating systems for the next year or so. Just like any other year, the bulk of the show was focused on iOS 27, but after the divisive changes, like Liquid Glass, that came to iOS 26 last year , the company focused on refining its operating systems. There weren't many hot new features announced, but there just didn't need to be.
paragraphs.cn: WWDC（全球开发者大会）通常是苹果展示未来一年iOS、macOS、tvOS等所有操作系统更新的舞台。与往年一样，本次大会的重头戏是iOS 27，但在去年iOS 26的Liquid Glass等争议性改动之后，苹果将重点放在了系统优化上。虽然宣布的新功能不多，但也没必要堆砌。

paragraphs.en: If you want to watch the WWDC keynote for yourself, you can stream it on Apple's event page, YouTube , or the Apple TV app. The stream should start right at 1:00pm ET / 10:00am PT.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你想亲自观看WWDC主题演讲，可以在苹果活动页面、YouTube或Apple TV应用上观看直播。直播于美国东部时间下午1:00/太平洋时间上午10:00（北京时间6月9日凌晨1:00）开始。

paragraphs.en: All times are in Eastern Standard Time (EST)
paragraphs.cn: 所有时间均为美国东部标准时间（EST）。

paragraphs.en: 2:12PM: And that's the show. Rather than having the huge design changes that WWDC 2025 had, this year was more about refinement. It seems like Tim Cook is also using this as the opportunity to sign off saying "it's been the honor of a lifetime" to change people's lives. And now, to end things a music video about apps, which was of course shot on iPhone and edited on Mac.
paragraphs.cn: 下午2:12：演讲到此结束。与WWDC 2025的巨大设计变革不同，今年更注重精雕细琢。蒂姆·库克似乎也借此机会告别，称「改变人们的生活是一生的荣幸」。最后，以一段关于应用的MV收尾，当然是用iPhone拍摄、Mac剪辑的。

paragraphs.en: 2:07PM : Some of these AI features will have daily limits due to data bandwidth. But, of course, you can buy a higher-tier iCloud subscription to raise those limits.
paragraphs.cn: 下午2:07：由于数据带宽限制，部分AI功能将有每日使用上限。当然，你可以购买更高等级的iCloud订阅来提升上限。

paragraphs.en: 2:05PM: With spatial reframing, you can use AI to, well, reframe the image. This feature uses spatial models generated by Apple Vision Pro, to change the angle you took an image from, without actually having to do a reshoot. It only generates new image data where it would otherwise be missing.
paragraphs.cn: 下午2:05：借助空间重构图功能，你可以用AI来重新构图。该功能利用Apple Vision Pro生成的空间模型，改变拍摄角度，无需实际重拍。它只会在缺失的地方生成新的图像数据。

paragraphs.en: 2:01PM: Image Playground is getting updates as well. Apple is implementing it across the entire platform, and it seems like it's a little bit more flexible than before.
paragraphs.cn: 下午2:01：Image Playground也迎来更新。苹果将其整合到整个平台，似乎比以前更灵活了。

paragraphs.en: 2:00PM: Apple is also updating Shortcuts to make it more user-friendly. This will let you describe the kind of workflow you want to automate, and then will use AI to create it for you. Shortcuts has been one of the most complicated things you can do with a smartphone, and it does seem like this will make it more approachable.
paragraphs.cn: 下午2:00：苹果还更新了「快捷指令」，使其更易用。你可以描述想要自动化的工作流程，AI会为你创建。快捷指令一直是智能手机上最复杂的操作之一，这一更新确实让它更亲民了。

paragraphs.en: 1:58PM: Notifications from the same app will no longer stack on top of each other. So if you're waiting for a delivery or you're getting directions, you won't have a stack of 5 different notifications to go through, the one notification will just get updated.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:58：同一应用的通知将不再堆叠。如果你在等快递或导航，不会再有一堆通知需要翻阅，单条通知会直接更新。

paragraphs.en: 1:55PM: Safari will also let you vibe code browser extensions! There's no way that will go wrong.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:55：Safari还将允许你通过「氛围编码」创建浏览器扩展！这肯定不会出问题。

paragraphs.en: 1:53PM: Safari will use AI to group browser tabs by subject, which actually sounds useful. I regularly have dozens of tabs open, and get lost. You can also have Siri monitor a webpage for a change, and it'll notify you when that change happens. It's Google alerts, but AI.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:53：Safari将利用AI按主题对浏览器标签页进行分组，这听起来确实有用。我经常打开几十个标签页，然后迷失其中。你还可以让Siri监控网页变化，并在变化发生时通知你。这就像谷歌快讯，但由AI驱动。

paragraphs.en: 1:50PM: Apple is introducing Visual Intelligence across its devices. This is a feature that basically every AI model these days has, and will let you show an image to Siri and ask it questions. On Mac, there will even be a keyboard shortcut to bring it up, and I just hope Apple doesn't pull a Microsoft, replacing a keyboard shortcut I actually use.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:50：苹果正在全设备引入视觉智能。这个功能如今几乎所有AI模型都有，你可以向Siri展示图片并提问。在Mac上，甚至会有键盘快捷键来调出它，我只希望苹果别学微软，替换掉我真正在用的快捷键。

paragraphs.en: 1:48PM: Chats with Siri will carry over to different Apple devices. That means you can start a chat on your phone, then pick it up on your Mac. Apple is even building a new Siri app into Apple Vision Pro, which will have a sort of 3D visualizer for the LLM.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:48：与Siri的对话将能在不同苹果设备间延续。这意味着你可以在手机上开始对话，然后在Mac上继续。苹果甚至还在Apple Vision Pro中内置了一款新的Siri应用，它将为大语言模型提供3D可视化界面。

paragraphs.en: 1:43PM: On macOS, the new Siri will be built into Spotlight. You'll be able to type questions into Spotlight and have Siri pull up an LLM to answer the question. Or you can just right click a file, or even a selection of files, and have the LLM reference those in its output. I'm not sure what exactly makes this "Apple Intelligence" but maybe Apple built a new model instead of just offloading it to ChatGPT like it used to?
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:43：在macOS上，新版Siri将集成到Spotlight中。你可以在Spotlight中输入问题，Siri会调用大语言模型来回答。或者，你可以右键点击一个文件甚至多个文件，让大语言模型在输出中引用这些文件。我不太确定这到底算不算「Apple Intelligence」，但也许苹果构建了新模型，而不是像以前那样直接甩给ChatGPT？

paragraphs.en: 1:39PM: You'll be able to use sliders to perfect Siri's voice. But I can't stop thinking of that one scene in Companion.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:39：你可以使用滑块来调整Siri的声音。但我总忍不住想起《伴侣》中的那个场景。

paragraphs.en: 1:37PM: I'm going to be honest, I've lost count of the amount of times that Apple has demo'd Siri being able to pull up info from a text message and use it to plan something. But it has never worked for me. Maybe it'll be different now, but this new version of Siri is very much "I'll believe it when I see it.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:37：老实说，我已经数不清苹果演示过多少次Siri能从短信中提取信息并用于规划了。但对我来说从来没用过。也许这次会不同，但新版Siri对我来说完全是「眼见为实」。

paragraphs.en: 1:35PM: Apple is announcing a new version of Siri, called Siri AI. This will work AI into the voice assistant, and only time will tell if it helps it be actually useful. Siri and other voice assistants built into smartphones have been struggling for years now, so hopefully these new AI tools will tighten things up again.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:35：苹果发布了新版Siri，名为Siri AI。它将AI融入语音助手，只有时间能证明它是否真的有用。Siri和其他智能手机内置的语音助手多年来一直表现不佳，希望这些新AI工具能改善现状。

paragraphs.en: 1:33PM: Apple insists data used for AI is not stored at all, and everything is deleted as soon as your request is executed. This should be non-negotiable, and at least Apple agrees.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:33：苹果坚称AI使用的数据不会被存储，请求执行后所有数据立即删除。这应该是底线，至少苹果认同这一点。

paragraphs.en: 1:30PM: It seems like Apple Intelligence is built more to enhance the Apple ecosystem than generate a bunch of text or images for you. Honestly, this is the kind of AI tool that's actually helpful, especially when you're trying to get some work done across different devices.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:30：Apple Intelligence似乎更多是为了增强苹果生态系统，而不是为你生成一堆文字或图片。老实说，这才是真正有用的AI工具，尤其是在跨设备工作时。

paragraphs.en: 1:28PM: And here it is, we're going to talk about Apple Intelligence. But Craig Federighi bemoans company pursuing AI for the sake of AI, so at least it seems like Apple is trying to create AI features that are actually helpful and private.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:28：好了，我们要聊聊Apple Intelligence了。但克雷格·费德里吉抱怨公司为了AI而AI，所以至少苹果似乎在努力打造真正有用且保护隐私的AI功能。

paragraphs.en: 1:24PM: There is also a time allowance feature, which will let parents control how much time their kids are using apps or playing games. Again, Apple will offer expert guidance, based on research, but the decision ultimately lies with the parents.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:24：还有时间配额功能，让家长控制孩子使用应用或玩游戏的时间。同样，苹果会提供基于研究的专家指导，但最终决定权在家长手中。

paragraphs.en: 1:22PM: iOS and iPadOS will already alert parents when their kids are buying or downloading an app from the App Store, but now there will be an 'ask to browse' feature that'll control what websites kids use, too.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:22：iOS和iPadOS已经会在孩子从App Store购买或下载应用时提醒家长，现在还将新增「请求浏览」功能，控制孩子访问的网站。

paragraphs.en: 1:20PM: Parents can convert their kids' accounts to Child Accounts whenever they want, and Apple will provide parents with expert guidance about what to allow on these accounts. There will be a setup assistant, that'll let parents decide exactly what they want their kids to see, and over time, kids will be able to add apps to their account, with parents getting the final say.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:20：家长可以随时将孩子的账户转换为儿童账户，苹果会提供专家指导，帮助家长决定允许哪些内容。设置助手将让家长精确决定孩子能看到什么，随着时间的推移，孩子可以向账户添加应用，但最终决定权在家长。

paragraphs.en: 1:18PM: Apple is expanding its child safety features, based on expert input, but ultimately leaving decisions up to parents. Apple also says that children under 13 should have limited access to smart devices.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:18：苹果正在扩展儿童安全功能，基于专家意见，但最终决定权留给家长。苹果还表示，13岁以下儿童应限制使用智能设备。

paragraphs.en: 1:16PM: Apple is improving photos, which happens every year, but what's actually cool is that Flyover on Apple Maps is getting a boost.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:16：苹果每年都会改进照片功能，但真正酷的是苹果地图的「Flyover」功能得到了增强。

paragraphs.en: 1:14PM: Apple has rebuilt its search index, which will optimize on-device search. This will apply to apps, messages, files and emails. Whenever I'm on iOS I rely almost entirely on search, so if Apple was able to speed that up, I'm a fan.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:14：苹果重建了搜索索引，将优化设备端搜索。这适用于应用、信息、文件和邮件。我在iOS上几乎完全依赖搜索，所以如果苹果能加快速度，我举双手赞成。

paragraphs.en: 1:12PM: iOS 27 will be available on all the same phones as iOS 26! That's huge, and it means less people will be forced to upgrade for the latest features. These are my favorite iOS releases, when it's more about under-the-hood tweaks.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:12：iOS 27将支持所有与iOS 26相同的机型！这太棒了，意味着更少人被迫为了新功能升级设备。这是我最喜欢的iOS版本，更注重底层优化。

paragraphs.en: 1:12PM: It also seems like Apple was able to find a way to make its apps more responsive, launching up to 30% faster on the next version of iOS. The company is also updating its CPU scheduler, which should help phones multitask a bit better. But whenever Apple talks about performance, I have to test it.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:12：苹果还找到了让应用响应更迅速的方法，在下一版iOS中启动速度提升高达30%。公司还更新了CPU调度器，有助于手机更好地处理多任务。但每当苹果谈论性能时，我都得亲自测试。

paragraphs.en: 1:10PM: Apple is also updating app icons again, to add even more Liquid Glass to them. Honestly, it looks almost 3D, which is cool, but I'll have to wait to see how they look on an actual iPhone to decide whether or not I like it.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:10：苹果再次更新了应用图标，加入了更多Liquid Glass效果。老实说，它看起来几乎是3D的，很酷，但我得等看到实际iPhone上的效果才能决定是否喜欢。

paragraphs.en: 1:06PM: It seems like they know that Liquid Glass was divisive, and Apple is refining it. Apple is adding a slider, which will adjust transparency of the feature. I know there are times where Liquid Glass can make things harder to read, hopefully this helps!
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:06：看来他们知道Liquid Glass存在争议，苹果正在改进它。苹果增加了一个滑块，可以调整该功能的透明度。我知道有时Liquid Glass会让内容更难阅读，希望这能有所帮助！

paragraphs.en: 1:05PM: The next version of macOS is Golden Gate. Less nature, and more big bridge.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:05：下一版macOS名为Golden Gate。少点自然，多点大桥。

paragraphs.en: 1:04PM: Tim handed off the stream to Craig Federighi, the SVP of Software, who's talking about trust and safety, at the same time he's talking about Apple Intelligence. Out of Google and Apple, Apple has always had the better security, but there's a part of 'trust and safety' being mentioned in the same sentence as AI that is at least a little funny.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:04：蒂姆将直播交给软件高级副总裁克雷格·费德里吉，他一边谈论信任与安全，一边谈论Apple Intelligence。在谷歌和苹果之间，苹果的安全一直更好，但「信任与安全」和AI出现在同一句话里，至少有点好笑。

paragraphs.en: 1:01PM: That answers that. Tim Cook is kicking off WWDC 2026, like he usually does.
paragraphs.cn: 下午1:01：答案揭晓。蒂姆·库克像往常一样，为WWDC 2026拉开序幕。

paragraphs.en: 12:49PM: And now we have the obligatory pop music with fancy graphics, that's how you know WWDC is about to begin. At least whoever picks this music has a decent taste. That's more than can be said for a lot of tech companies.
paragraphs.cn: 下午12:49：现在播放着必备的流行音乐和炫酷画面，你就知道WWDC要开始了。至少选曲的人品味不错，这比很多科技公司强。
